components.name: Slider
components.description: A Slider component for displaying current value and intervals in range.
components.descriptionZh: 滑动型输入器，展示当前值和可选范围。
components.whenToUse: Used to input a value within a specified range.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

当用户需要在数值区间/自定义区间内进行选择时，可为连续或离散值。

props.name: classNames
props.description: Customize class for each semantic structure inside the component. Supports object or function.
props.descriptionZh: 用于自定义组件内部各语义化结构的 class，支持对象或函数

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: The default value of the slider. When `range` is false, use number, otherwise, use \[number, number]
props.descriptionZh: 设置初始取值。当 `range` 为 false 时，使用 number，否则用 \[number, number]

props.name: disabled
props.description: If true, the slider will not be interactive
props.descriptionZh: 值为 true 时，滑块为禁用状态

props.name: keyboard
props.description: Support using keyboard to move handlers
props.descriptionZh: 支持使用键盘操作 handler

props.name: dots
props.description: Whether the thumb can only be dragged to tick marks
props.descriptionZh: 是否只能拖拽到刻度上

props.name: included
props.description: Takes effect when `marks` is not null. True means containment and false means coordinative
props.descriptionZh: `marks` 不为空对象时有效，值为 true 时表示值为包含关系，false 表示并列

props.name: marks
props.description: Tick marks of Slider. The type of key must be `number`, and must be in closed interval \[min, max]. Each mark can declare its own style
props.descriptionZh: 刻度标记，key 的类型必须为 `number` 且取值在闭区间 \[min, max] 内，每个标签可以单独设置样式

props.name: max
props.description: The maximum value the slider can slide to
props.descriptionZh: 最大值

props.name: min
props.description: The minimum value the slider can slide to
props.descriptionZh: 最小值

props.name: orientation
props.description: Orientation
props.descriptionZh: 排列方向

props.name: range
props.description: Enable dual thumb mode for range selection
props.descriptionZh: 双滑块模式

props.name: reverse
props.description: Reverse the component
props.descriptionZh: 反向坐标轴

props.name: step
props.description: The granularity the slider can step through values. Must be greater than 0, and be divisible by (max - min). When `step` is `null` and `marks` exist, valid points will only be marks, `min` and `max`
props.descriptionZh: 步长，取值必须大于 0，并且可被 (max - min) 整除。当 `marks` 不为空对象时，可以设置 `step` 为 null，此时 Slider 的可选值仅有 `marks`、`min` 和 `max`

props.name: styles
props.description: Customize inline style for each semantic structure inside the component. Supports object or function.
props.descriptionZh: 用于自定义组件内部各语义化结构的行内 style，支持对象或函数

props.name: tooltip
props.description: The tooltip related props
props.descriptionZh: 设置 Tooltip 相关属性

props.name: value
props.description: The value of slider. When `range` is false, use number, otherwise, use \[number, number]
props.descriptionZh: 设置当前取值。当 `range` 为 false 时，使用 number，否则用 \[number, number]

props.name: vertical
props.description: If true, the slider will be vertical. Simultaneously existing with `orientation`, `orientation` takes priority
props.descriptionZh: 值为 true 时，Slider 为垂直方向。与 `orientation` 同时存在，以 `orientation` 优先

props.name: onChangeComplete
props.description: Fire when `mouseup` or `keyup` is fired
props.descriptionZh: 与 `mouseup` 和 `keyup` 触发时机一致，把当前值作为参数传入

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback function that is fired when the user changes the slider's value
props.descriptionZh: 当 Slider 的值发生改变时，会触发 onChange 事件，并把改变后的值作为参数传入

props.name: draggableTrack
props.description: Whether range track can be dragged
props.descriptionZh: 范围刻度是否可被拖拽

props.name: editable
props.description: Dynamic edit nodes. Cannot be used with `draggableTrack`
props.descriptionZh: 启动动态增减节点，不能和 `draggableTrack` 一同使用

props.name: minCount
props.description: The minimum count of nodes
props.descriptionZh: 配置 `editable` 时，最小节点数量

props.name: maxCount
props.description: The maximum count of nodes
props.descriptionZh: 配置 `editable` 时，最大节点数量

props.name: autoAdjustOverflow
props.description: Whether to automatically adjust the popup position
props.descriptionZh: 是否自动调整弹出位置

props.name: open
props.description: If true, Tooltip will always be visible; if false, it will never be visible, even when dragging or hovering
props.descriptionZh: 值为 true 时，Tooltip 将会始终显示；否则始终不显示，哪怕在拖拽及移入时

props.name: placement
props.description: Set Tooltip display position. Ref [Tooltip](/components/tooltip/)
props.descriptionZh: 设置 Tooltip 展示位置。参考 [Tooltip](/components/tooltip-cn)

props.name: getPopupContainer
props.description: The DOM container of the Tooltip. The default behavior is to create a div element in the body
props.descriptionZh: Tooltip 渲染父节点，默认渲染到 body 上

props.name: formatter
props.description: Slider will pass its value to `formatter`, display its value in Tooltip, and hide the Tooltip when the returned value is null
props.descriptionZh: Slider 会把当前值传给 `formatter`，并在 Tooltip 中显示 `formatter` 的返回值，若为 null，则隐藏 Tooltip

demos.description: Using `marks` property to mark a graduated slider, use `value` or `defaultValue` to specify the position of thumb. When `included` is false, means that different thumbs are coordinative. when `step` is null, users can only slide the thumbs onto marks.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `marks` 属性标注分段式滑块，使用 `value` / `defaultValue` 指定滑块位置。当 `included=false` 时，表明不同标记间为并列关系。当 `step=null` 时，Slider 的可选值仅有 `marks` 标出来的部分。

demos.descriptionZh: 范围多个点组合。

demos.descriptionZh: 当 `tooltip.open` 为 `true` 时，将始终显示 ToolTip；反之则始终不显示，即使在拖动、移入时也是如此。

components.name: Space
components.description: Set components spacing.
components.descriptionZh: 设置组件之间的间距。
components.whenToUse:
- Avoid components clinging together and set a unified space.
- Use Space.Compact when child form components are compactly connected and the border is collapsed (After version `antd@4.24.0` Supported).

### Difference with Flex component

- Space is used to set the spacing between inline elements. It will add a wrapper element for each child element for inline alignment. Suitable for equidistant arrangement of multiple child elements in rows and columns.
- Flex is used to set the layout of block-level elements. It does not add a wrapper element. Suitable for layout of child elements in vertical or horizontal direction, and provides more flexibility and control.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

避免组件紧贴在一起，拉开统一的空间。

- 适合行内元素的水平间距。
- 可以设置各种水平对齐方式。
- 需要表单组件之间紧凑连接且合并边框时，使用 Space.Compact（自 `antd@4.24.0` 版本开始提供该组件）。

### 与 Flex 组件的区别 {#difference-with-flex-component}

- Space 为内联元素提供间距，其本身会为每一个子元素添加包裹元素用于内联对齐。适用于行、列中多个子元素的等距排列。
- Flex 为块级元素提供间距，其本身不会添加包裹元素。适用于垂直或水平方向上的子元素布局，并提供了更多的灵活性和控制能力。

demos.name: compact-button-vertical
demos.title: Vertical Compact Mode
demos.description: Vertical Mode for Space.Compact, support Button only.
demos.descriptionZh: 垂直方向的紧凑布局，目前仅支持 Button 组合。
demos.code:
import React from 'react';
import { Button, Space } from 'antd';

const App: React.FC = () => (
  <Space>
    <Space.Compact orientation="vertical">
      <Button>Button 1</Button>
      <Button>Button 2</Button>
      <Button>Button 3</Button>
    </Space.Compact>
    <Space.Compact orientation="vertical">
      <Button type="dashed">Button 1</Button>
      <Button type="dashed">Button 2</Button>
      <Button type="dashed">Button 3</Button>
    </Space.Compact>
    <Space.Compact orientation="vertical">
      <Button type="primary">Button 1</Button>
      <Button type="primary">Button 2</Button>
      <Button type="primary">Button 3</Button>
    </Space.Compact>
    <Space.Compact orientation="vertical">
      <Button variant="outlined">Button 1</Button>
      <Button variant="outlined">Button 2</Button>
      <Button variant="outlined">Button 3</Button>
    </Space.Compact>
  </Space>
);

export default App;

components.name: Steps
components.description: A navigation bar that guides users through the steps of a task.
components.descriptionZh: 引导用户按照流程完成任务的导航条。
components.whenToUse: When a given task is complicated or has a certain sequence in the series of subtasks, we can decompose it into several steps to make things easier.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

当任务复杂或者存在先后关系时，将其分解成一系列步骤，从而简化任务。

props.name: classNames

components.name: Switch
components.description: Used to toggle between two states.
components.descriptionZh: 使用开关切换两种状态之间。
components.whenToUse:
- If you need to represent the switching between two states or on-off state.
- The difference between `Switch` and `Checkbox` is that `Switch` will trigger a state change directly when you toggle it, while `Checkbox` is generally used for state marking, which should work in conjunction with submit operation.

faq.question: Why not work in Form.Item?
faq.answer:
Form.Item default bind value to `value` property, but Switch value property is `checked`. You can use `valuePropName` to change bind property.

```tsx | pure
<Form.Item name="fieldA" valuePropName="checked">
  <Switch />
</Form.Item>
```

demos.name: ajax
demos.title: Ajax
demos.description: This example shows how to fetch and present data from a remote server, and how to implement filtering and sorting in server side by sending related parameters to server.
demos.descriptionZh:
这个例子通过简单的 ajax 读取方式，演示了如何从服务端读取并展现数据，具有筛选、排序等功能以及页面 loading 效果。开发者可以自行接入其他数据处理方式。

另外，本例也展示了筛选排序功能如何交给服务端实现，列不需要指定具体的 `onFilter` 和 `sorter` 函数，而是在把筛选和排序的参数发到服务端来处理。

当使用 `rowSelection` 时，请设置 `rowSelection.preserveSelectedRowKeys` 属性以保留 `key`。

**注意，此示例使用 [模拟接口](https://mocky.io)，展示数据可能不准确，请打开网络面板查看请求。**

> 🛎️ 想要 3 分钟实现？试试 [ProTable](https://procomponents.ant.design/components/table)！

demos.descriptionZh: `filterSearch` 用于开启筛选项的搜索，通过 `filterSearch:(input, record) => boolean` 设置自定义筛选方法

demos.name: fixed-columns-header
demos.title: Fixed Columns and Header
demos.description: A Solution for displaying large amounts of data with long columns.
demos.descriptionZh:
适合同时展示有大量数据和数据列。

> 若列头与内容不对齐或出现列重复，请指定**固定列**的宽度 `width`。如果指定 `width` 不生效或出现白色垂直空隙，请尝试建议留一列不设宽度以适应弹性布局，或者检查是否有[超长连续字段破坏布局](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/13825#issuecomment-449889241)。
>
> 建议指定 `scroll.x` 为大于表格宽度的固定值或百分比。注意，且非固定列宽度之和不要超过 `scroll.x`。

demos.name: fixed-columns
demos.title: Fixed Columns
demos.description: To fix some columns and scroll inside other columns, and you must set `scroll.x` meanwhile.
demos.descriptionZh:
对于列数很多的数据，可以固定前后的列，横向滚动查看其它数据，需要和 `scroll.x` 配合使用。

> 若列头与内容不对齐或出现列重复，请指定**固定列**的宽度 `width`。如果指定 `width` 不生效或出现白色垂直空隙，请尝试建议留一列不设宽度以适应弹性布局，或者检查是否有[超长连续字段破坏布局](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/13825#issuecomment-449889241)。
>
> 建议指定 `scroll.x` 为大于表格宽度的固定值或百分比。注意，且非固定列宽度之和不要超过 `scroll.x`。

**注意：v4 版本固定列通过 sticky 实现，IE 11 会降级成横向滚动。**

demos.description: Fixed column only when scroll some distance, and scroll to stack other columns. Recommend use with `bordered`.

demos.name: fixed-header
demos.title: Fixed Header
demos.description: Display large amounts of data in scrollable view.
demos.descriptionZh:
方便一页内展示大量数据。

需要指定 column 的 `width` 属性，否则列头和内容可能不对齐。如果指定 `width` 不生效或出现白色垂直空隙，请尝试建议留一列不设宽度以适应弹性布局，或者检查是否有[超长连续字段破坏布局](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/13825#issuecomment-449889241)。

demos.name: grouping-columns
demos.title: Grouping table head
demos.description: Group table head with `columns[n].children`.
demos.descriptionZh: `columns[n]` 可以内嵌 `children`，以渲染分组表头。

demos.name: head
demos.title: Filter and sorter
demos.description: Use `filters` to generate filter menu in columns, `onFilter` to determine filtered result, and `filterMultiple` to indicate whether it's multiple or single selection, `filterOnClose` to specify whether to trigger filter when the filter menu closes.
demos.descriptionZh:
对某一列数据进行筛选，使用列的 `filters` 属性来指定需要筛选菜单的列，`onFilter` 用于筛选当前数据，`filterMultiple` 用于指定多选和单选，`filterOnClose` 用于指定是否在筛选菜单关闭时触发筛选。

使用 `defaultFilteredValue` 属性，设置列的默认筛选项。

对某一列数据进行排序，通过指定列的 `sorter` 函数即可启动排序按钮。`sorter: function(rowA, rowB) { ... }`， rowA、rowB 为比较的两个行数据。

`sortDirections: ['ascend', 'descend']` 改变每列可用的排序方式，切换排序时按数组内容依次切换，设置在 table props 上时对所有列生效。你可以通过设置 `['ascend', 'descend', 'ascend']` 禁止排序恢复到默认状态。

使用 `defaultSortOrder` 属性，设置列的默认排序顺序。

如果 `sortOrder` 或者 `defaultSortOrder` 的值为 `ascend` 或者 `descend`，则可以通过 `sorter` 的函数第三个参数获取当前排序的状态。该函数可以是 `function(a, b, sortOrder) { ... }` 的形式。

demos.name: hidden-columns
demos.title: Hidden Columns
demos.description: Hide columns with `hidden`.
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 `hidden` 隐藏列。

demos.name: jsx
demos.title: JSX style API
demos.description: Using JSX style API (introduced in 2.5.0)
demos.descriptionZh:
使用 JSX 风格的 API（2.5.0 以后引入）

> 这个只是一个描述 `columns` 的语法糖，所以你不能用其他组件去包裹 `Column` 和 `ColumnGroup`。

demos.name: multiple-sorter
demos.title: Multiple sorter
demos.description: `column.sorter` support `multiple` to config the priority of sort columns. Though `sorter.compare` to customize compare function. You can also leave it empty to use the interactive only.
demos.descriptionZh: `column.sorter` 支持 `multiple` 字段以配置多列排序优先级。通过 `sorter.compare` 配置排序逻辑，你可以通过不设置该函数只启动多列排序的交互形式。

demos.name: nested-table
demos.title: Nested tables
demos.description: Showing more detailed info of every row.
demos.descriptionZh: 展示每行数据更详细的信息。

demos.name: order-column
demos.title: Order Specific Column
demos.description: You can control the order of the expand and select columns by using `Table.EXPAND_COLUMN` and `Table.SELECTION_COLUMN`.
demos.descriptionZh: 你可以通过 `Table.EXPAND_COLUMN` 和 `Table.SELECTION_COLUMN` 来控制选择和展开列的顺序。

demos.name: pagination
demos.title: Pagination Settings
demos.description: Table pagination settings.
demos.descriptionZh: 表格的分页设置。

demos.name: reset-filter
demos.title: Reset filters and sorters
demos.description: Control filters and sorters by `filteredValue` and `sortOrder`.
demos.descriptionZh:
使用受控属性对筛选和排序状态进行控制。

> 1. columns 中定义了 filteredValue 和 sortOrder 属性即视为受控模式。
> 2. 只支持同时对一列进行排序，请保证只有一列的 sortOrder 属性是生效的。
> 3. 务必指定 `column.key`。

demos.name: responsive
demos.title: Responsive
demos.description: Responsive columns.
demos.descriptionZh: 响应式配置列的展示。

demos.name: row-selection-and-operation
demos.title: Selection and operation
demos.description: To perform operations and clear selections after selecting some rows, use `rowSelection.selectedRowKeys` to control selected rows.
demos.descriptionZh: 选择后进行操作，完成后清空选择，通过 `rowSelection.selectedRowKeys` 来控制选中项。

demos.name: row-selection-custom
demos.title: Custom selection
demos.description: Use `rowSelection.selections` custom selections, default no select dropdown, show default selections via setting to `true`.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `rowSelection.selections` 自定义选择项，默认不显示下拉选项，设为 `true` 时显示默认选择项。

demos.name: row-selection
demos.title: selection
demos.description: Rows can be selectable by making first column as a selectable column. You can use `rowSelection.type` to set selection type. Default is `checkbox`.
demos.descriptionZh:
第一列是联动的选择框。可以通过 `rowSelection.type` 属性指定选择类型，默认为 `checkbox`。

> 默认点击 checkbox 触发选择行为，需要点击行触发可以参考例子：<https://codesandbox.io/s/000vqw38rl>

demos.name: size
demos.title: size
demos.description: There are two compacted table sizes: `middle` and `small`. The `small` size is used in Modals only.
demos.descriptionZh: 两种紧凑型的列表，小型列表只用于对话框内。

demos.name: sticky
demos.title: Fixed header and scroll bar with the page
demos.titleZh: 随页面滚动的固定表头和滚动条
demos.description: For long table，need to scroll to view the header and scroll bar，then you can now set the fixed header and scroll bar to follow the page.
demos.descriptionZh: 对于长表格，需要滚动才能查看表头和滚动条，那么现在可以设置跟随页面固定表头和滚动条。

demos.name: style-class
demos.title: Custom semantic dom styling
demos.titleZh: 自定义语义结构的样式和类
demos.description: You can customize the [semantic dom](#semantic-dom) style of Table by passing objects/functions through `classNames` and `styles`.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `classNames` 和 `styles` 传入对象/函数可以自定义 Table 的[语义化结构](#semantic-dom)样式。

demos.name: summary
demos.title: Summary
demos.description: Set summary content by `summary` prop. Sync column fixed status with `Table.Summary.Cell`. You can fixed it by set `Table.Summary` `fixed` prop(since `4.16.0`).
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `summary` 设置总结栏。使用 `Table.Summary.Cell` 同步 Column 的固定状态。你可以通过配置 `Table.Summary` 的 `fixed` 属性使其固定(`4.16.0` 支持)。

demos.name: tree-data
demos.title: Tree data
demos.description: Display tree structure data in Table when there is field key `children` in dataSource, try to customize `childrenColumnName` property to avoid tree table structure.
demos.descriptionZh:
表格支持树形数据的展示，当数据中有 `children` 字段时会自动展示为树形表格，如果不需要或配置为其他字段可以用 `childrenColumnName` 进行配置。

可以通过设置 `indentSize` 以控制每一层的缩进宽度。

demos.name: virtual-list
demos.title: Virtual list
demos.description: Set `virtual` to enable virtual scroll, and `scroll.x` and `scroll.y` must be set at the same time with `number` type.
demos.descriptionZh: 通过 `virtual` 开启虚拟滚动，此时 `scroll.x` 与 `scroll.y` 必须设置且为 `number` 类型。

faq.question: How to hide pagination when single page or no data?
faq.answer: You can set `hideOnSinglePage` with `pagination` prop.

faq.question: Table will return to first page when filter data.
faq.answer:
Table total page count usually reduce after filter data, we by default return to first page in case of current page is out of filtered results.

You may need to keep current page after filtering when fetch data from remote service, please check [this demo](https://codesandbox.io/s/yuanchengjiazaishuju-ant-design-demo-7y2uf) as workaround.

Also you can use the action from extra param to determine when return to first page.

faq.question: Why Table pagination show size changer?
faq.answer: In order to improve user experience, Pagination show size changer by default when `total > 50` since `4.1.0`. You can set `showSizeChanger=false` to disable this feature.

faq.question: Why Table fully render when state change?
faq.answer: Table can not tell what state used in `columns.render`, so it always need fully render to avoid sync issue. You can use `column.shouldCellUpdate` to control render.

faq.question: How to handle fixed column display over the mask layout?
faq.answer: Fixed column use `z-index` to make it over other columns. You will find sometimes fixed columns also over your mask layout. You can set `z-index` on your mask layout to resolve.

faq.question: How to custom render Table Checkbox（For example, adding Tooltip）?
faq.answer: Since `4.1.0`, You can use [`rowSelection.renderCell`](https://ant.design/components/table/#rowselection) to custom render Table Checkbox. If you want to add Tooltip, please refer to this [demo](https://codesandbox.io/s/table-row-tooltip-v79j2v).

faq.question: Why does components.body.wrapper or components.body.row report an error when virtual is enabled?

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tabs make it easy to explore and switch between different views.
components.descriptionZh: 选项卡切换组件。
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

提供平级的区域将大块内容进行收纳和展现，保持界面整洁。

Ant Design 依次提供了三级选项卡，分别用于不同的场景。

- 卡片式的页签，提供可关闭的样式，常用于容器顶部。
- 既可用于容器顶部，也可用于容器内部，是最通用的 Tabs。
- [Radio.Button](/components/radio-cn/#radio-demo-radiobutton) 可作为更次级的页签来使用。

demos.name: animation
demos.title: Animate
demos.description: Animating the Tag by using [rc-tween-one](https://github.com/react-component/tween-one).
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 [rc-tween-one](https://github.com/react-component/tween-one) 给标签增加添加或删除动画。

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic
demos.description: Usage of basic Tag, and it could be closable and customize close button by set `closeIcon` property, will display default close button when `closeIcon` is setting to `true`. Closable Tag supports `onClose` events.
demos.descriptionZh: 基本标签的用法，可以通过设置 `closeIcon` 变为可关闭标签并自定义关闭按钮，设置为 `true` 时将使用默认关闭按钮。可关闭标签具有 `onClose` 事件。

demos.name: checkable
demos.title: Checkable
demos.description: `CheckableTag` works like Checkbox, click it to toggle checked state. `CheckableTagGroup` provides function that is similar to `CheckboxGroup` or `RadioGroup`.
demos.descriptionZh:
可通过 `CheckableTag` 实现类似 Checkbox 的效果，点击切换选中效果。而 `CheckableTagGroup` 则提供了类似 `CheckboxGroup` 或 `RadioGroup` 的功能。

> `CheckableTag` 为完全受控组件，不支持非受控用法。

demos.name: colorful
demos.title: Colorful Tag
demos.description: We preset a series of colorful tag styles for use in different situations. You can also set it to a hex color string for custom color.
demos.descriptionZh: 我们添加了多种预设色彩的标签样式，用作不同场景使用。如果预设值不能满足你的需求，可以设置为具体的色值。

demos.name: control
demos.title: Add & Remove Dynamically
demos.description: Generating a set of Tags by array, you can add and remove dynamically.
demos.descriptionZh: 用数组生成一组标签，可以动态添加和删除。

demos.name: draggable
demos.title: Draggable Tag
demos.description: Draggable tags using [dnd kit](https://dndkit.com).
demos.descriptionZh: 使用 [dnd kit](https://dndkit.com) 实现的可拖拽标签。

demos.name: icon
demos.title: Icon
demos.description: You can add a custom icon to the tag via the `icon` prop. Note that the `icon` prop for CheckableTag is only supported in version `>=5.27.0`.
demos.descriptionZh:
你可以通过 `icon` 属性为标签添加自定义图标。注意，CheckableTag 的 `icon` 属性在 `>=5.27.0` 版本支持。

若需要控制图标的位置，请在 `children` 中直接使用 `<XXXIcon />` 组件，而非通过 `icon` 属性实现。

demos.name: status
demos.title: Status Tag
demos.description: We preset five different colors, you can set color property such as `success`,`processing`,`error`,`default` and `warning` to indicate specific status.
demos.descriptionZh: 预设五种状态颜色，可以通过设置 `color` 为 `success`、 `processing`、`error`、`default`、`warning` 来代表不同的状态。

demos.name: interval-options

demos.descriptionZh: 可以使用 `hourStep` `minuteStep` `secondStep` 按步长展示可选的时分秒。

demos.name: need-confirm
demos.title: Need Confirm
demos.description: TimePicker will automatically determine whether to show a confirm button according to the `picker` property. You can also set the `needConfirm` property to determine whether to show a confirm button. When `needConfirm` is set, the user must click the confirm button to complete the selection. Otherwise, the selection will be submitted when the picker loses focus or select a time.
demos.descriptionZh: TimePicker 默认会根据 `picker` 的交互行为，自动选择是否需要确认按钮。你也可以通过 `needConfirm` 属性来手动设置是否需要确认按钮。当有 `needConfirm` 时，用户始终需要点击确认按钮才能完成选择。反之，则会在选择或者失去焦点时提交。

demos.name: variant
demos.title: Variants
demos.description: Variants of TimePicker, there are four variants: `outlined` `filled` `borderless` and `underlined`.
demos.descriptionZh: TimePicker 形态变体，可选 `outlined` `filled` `borderless` `underlined` 四种形态。
demos.code:
import React from 'react';
import { Flex, TimePicker } from 'antd';

const { RangePicker } = TimePicker;

const App: React.FC = () => (
  <Flex vertical gap={12}>
    <Flex gap={8}>
      <TimePicker placeholder="Outlined" />
      <RangePicker placeholder={['Outlined Start', 'Outlined End']} />
    </Flex>
    <Flex gap={8}>
      <TimePicker variant="filled" placeholder="Filled" />
      <RangePicker variant="filled" placeholder={['Filled Start', 'Filled End']} />
    </Flex>
    <Flex gap={8}>
      <TimePicker variant="borderless" placeholder="Borderless" />
      <RangePicker variant="borderless" placeholder={['Borderless Start', 'Borderless End']} />
    </Flex>
    <Flex gap={8}>
      <TimePicker variant="underlined" placeholder="Underlined" />
      <RangePicker variant="underlined" placeholder={['Underlined Start', 'Underlined End']} />
    </Flex>
  </Flex>
);

export default App;

faq.question: Why doesn't HOC work sometimes?
faq.answer:
Please ensure that the child elements of `Tooltip` can accept `onMouseEnter`, `onMouseLeave`, `onPointerEnter`, `onPointerLeave`, `onFocus`, `onClick` events.

Please refer to https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/15909

faq.question: Why Tooltip not update content when close?
faq.answer:
Tooltip will cache content when it is closed to avoid flicker when content is updated: ```jsx // `title` will not blink when `user` is empty ```
If need update content when close, you can set `fresh` property ([#44830](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/44830)): ```jsx ```
---

components.name: Transfer
components.description: Double column transfer choice box.
components.descriptionZh: 双栏穿梭选择框。
components.whenToUse:
- It is a select control essentially which can be use for selecting multiple items.
- Transfer can display more information for items and take up more space.

Transfer the elements between two columns in an intuitive and efficient way.

One or more elements can be selected from either column, one click on the proper `direction` button, and the transfer is done. The left column is considered the `source` and the right column is considered the `target`. As you can see in the API description, these names are reflected in.

> notice: Transfer is a controlled component, uncontrolled mode is not supported.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

- 需要在多个可选项中进行多选时。
- 比起 Select 和 TreeSelect，穿梭框占据更大的空间，可以展示可选项的更多信息。

穿梭选择框用直观的方式在两栏中移动元素，完成选择行为。

选择一个或以上的选项后，点击对应的方向键，可以把选中的选项移动到另一栏。其中，左边一栏为 `source`，右边一栏为 `target`，API 的设计也反映了这两个概念。

> 注意：穿梭框组件只支持受控使用，不支持非受控模式。

demos.name: actions
demos.title: Custom Actions
demos.description: You can customize operations with the `actions` prop. This example demonstrates how to customize actions, including handling disabled and loading states.
demos.descriptionZh:
使用 `actions` 属性可以自定义操作按钮。

当 `actions` 传入字符串数组时，会使用默认的 Button 组件，并将字符串作为按钮文本。

当 `actions` 传入 React 元素数组时，会直接使用这些元素作为操作按钮，这样你可以使用自定义的按钮组件，如本例中的带有加载状态的按钮。

注意：

1. 当使用自定义按钮时，Transfer 组件会自动处理按钮的禁用状态和点击事件。
2. 你可以在自定义按钮上添加 `disabled` 属性来控制按钮的禁用状态。
3. 你可以在自定义按钮上添加 `onClick` 事件处理函数，它会与 Transfer 组件的内部处理函数合并执行。

components.name: Tree
components.description: Multiple-level structure list.
components.descriptionZh: 多层次的结构列表。
components.whenToUse: Almost anything can be represented in a tree structure. Examples include directories, organization hierarchies, biological classifications, countries, etc. The `Tree` component is a way of representing the hierarchical relationship between these things. You can also expand, collapse, and select a treeNode within a `Tree`.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

文件夹、组织架构、生物分类、国家地区等等，世间万物的大多数结构都是树形结构。使用 `树控件` 可以完整展现其中的层级关系，并具有展开收起选择等交互功能。

faq.question: Why defaultExpandAll not working on ajax data?
faq.answer: `default` prefix props only work when initializing. So `defaultExpandAll` has already been executed when ajax loads data. You can control `expandedKeys` or render the Tree when data is loaded to realize expanding all nodes.

faq.question: Virtual scroll limitation
faq.answer: Virtual scroll only render items in visible region. Thus not support auto width (like long `title` with horizontal scroll).

faq.question: What does `disabled` node work logic in the tree?
faq.answer:
Tree change its data by conduction. Includes checked or auto expanded, it will conduction state to parent / children node until current node is `disabled`. So if a controlled node is `disabled`, it will only modify self state and not affect other nodes. For example, a parent node contains 3 child nodes and one of them is `disabled`. When check the parent node, it will only check rest 2 child nodes. As the same, when check these 2 child node, parent will be checked whatever checked state the `disabled` one is.

This conduction logic prevents modifying `disabled` parent checked state by checking children nodes, and users cannot modify directly with click which avoids interactive conflicts. If you want to modify this conduction logic, you can customize it with the `checkStrictly` prop.

props.descriptionZh: 菜单渲染父节点。默认渲染到 body 上，如果你遇到菜单滚动定位问题，试试修改为滚动的区域，并相对其定位。[示例](https://codepen.io/afc163/pen/zEjNOy?editors=0010)

props.name: labelInValue
props.description: Whether to embed label in value, turn the format of value from `string` to {value: string, label: ReactNode, halfChecked: boolean (Is the option list in a semi selected state and not displayed in the values)}
props.descriptionZh: 是否把每个选项的 label 包装到 value 中，会把 value 类型从 `string` 变为 {value: string, label: ReactNode, halfChecked: boolean(选项列表是否为半选状态，并且不会展示到值中) } 的格式

props.name: listHeight
props.description: Config popup height
props.descriptionZh: 设置弹窗滚动高度

props.name: loadData
props.description: Load data asynchronously. Will not load when filtering. Check FAQ for more info
props.descriptionZh: 异步加载数据。在过滤时不会调用以防止网络堵塞，可参考 FAQ 获得更多内容

props.name: maxTagCount
props.description: Max tag count to show. `responsive` will cost render performance
props.descriptionZh: 最多显示多少个 tag，响应式模式会对性能产生损耗

props.name: maxCount
props.description: The maximum number of items that can be selected. Only takes effect when `multiple=true`. If (`showCheckedStrategy = 'SHOW_ALL'` and `treeCheckStrictly` is disabled) or `showCheckedStrategy = 'SHOW_PARENT'` is used, `maxCount` will not take effect.
props.descriptionZh: 指定可选中的最多 items 数量，仅在 `multiple=true` 时生效。如果此时 (`showCheckedStrategy = 'SHOW_ALL'` 且未开启 `treeCheckStrictly`)，或使用 `showCheckedStrategy = 'SHOW_PARENT'`，则maxCount无效。

props.name: maxTagPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for not showing tags
props.descriptionZh: 隐藏 tag 时显示的内容

props.name: maxTagTextLength
props.description: Max tag text length to show
props.descriptionZh: 最大显示的 tag 文本长度

props.name: multiple
props.description: Support multiple or not, will be `true` when enable `treeCheckable`
props.descriptionZh: 支持多选（当设置 treeCheckable 时自动变为 true）

props.name: notFoundContent
props.description: Specify content to show when no result matches
props.descriptionZh: 当下拉列表为空时显示的内容

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state of dropdown
props.descriptionZh: 是否展开下拉菜单

props.description: Placeholder of the select input
props.descriptionZh: 选择框默认文字

props.name: placement
props.description: The position where the selection box pops up

props.name: prefix
props.description: The custom prefix
props.descriptionZh: 自定义前缀

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Work with `onSearch` to make search value controlled

props.name: showCheckedStrategy
props.description: The way show selected item in box when `treeCheckable` set. **Default:** just show child nodes. **`TreeSelect.SHOW_ALL`:** show all checked treeNodes (include parent treeNode). **`TreeSelect.SHOW_PARENT`:** show checked treeNodes (just show parent treeNode)
props.descriptionZh: 配置 `treeCheckable` 时，定义选中项回填的方式。`TreeSelect.SHOW_ALL`: 显示所有选中节点(包括父节点)。`TreeSelect.SHOW_PARENT`: 只显示父节点(当父节点下所有子节点都选中时)。 默认只显示子节点

props.description: Support search or not
props.descriptionZh: 是否支持搜索框

props.name: size

props.descriptionZh: 选择框大小

props.name: status

props.descriptionZh: 设置校验状态

props.name: suffixIcon

props.name: styles

props.name: treeCheckStrictly

props.name: treeData
props.type: array<{ value, title, children, \[disabled, disableCheckbox, selectable, checkable] }>

props.name: treeDataSimpleMode

props.description: Enable simple mode of treeData. Changes the `treeData` schema to: \[{id:1, pId:0, value:'1', title:"test1",...},...] where pId is parent node's id). It is possible to replace the default `id` and `pId` keys by providing object to `treeDataSimpleMode`
props.descriptionZh: 使用简单格式的 treeData，具体设置参考可设置的类型 (此时 treeData 应变为这样的数据结构: \[{id:1, pId:0, value:'1', title:"test1",...},...]， `pId` 是父节点的 id)

faq.question: How to get parent node in onChange?
faq.answer: We don't provide this since performance consideration. You can get by this way: <https://codesandbox.io/s/get-parent-node-in-onchange-eb1608>

faq.question: Why sometimes customize Option cause scroll break?
faq.answer: You can ref Select [FAQ](/components/select).

faq.question: Why `loadData` not trigger when searching?
Why can't popup scroll horizontally?
faq.answer: Just turn off virtual scrolling, because the `scrollWidth` of the complete list cannot be accurately measured when virtual scrolling is turned on.

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic
demos.description: Display the document sample.
demos.descriptionZh: 展示文档样例。
demos.code:
import React from 'react'; import { Divider, Typography } from 'antd'; const { Title, Paragraph, Text, Link } = Typography; const blockContent = `AntV 是蚂蚁集团全新一代数据可视化解决方案，致力于提供一套简单方便、专业可靠、不限可能的数据可视化最佳实践。得益于丰富的业务场景和用户需求挑战，AntV 经历多年积累与不断打磨，已支撑整个阿里集团内外 20000+ 业务系统，通过了日均千万级 UV 产品的严苛考验。 我们正在基础图表，图分析，图编辑，地理空间可视化，智能可视化等各个可视化的领域耕耘，欢迎同路人一起前行。`; const App: React.FC = () => ( Introduction In the process of internal desktop applications development, many different design specs and implementations would be involved, which might cause designers and developers difficulties and duplication and reduce the efficiency of development. After massive project practice and summaries, Ant Design, a design language for background applications, is refined by Ant UED Team, which aims to{' '} uniform the user interface specs for internal background projects, lower the unnecessary cost of design differences and implementation and liberate the resources of design and front-end development . Guidelines and Resources We supply a series of design principles, practical patterns and high quality design resources (Sketch and Axure), to help people create their product prototypes beautifully and efficiently.

demos.descriptionZh: 多行文本省略。你可以通过 `tooltip` 属性配置省略展示内容，大量文本时推荐优先使用 `expandable`。

demos.name: text
demos.title: Text and Link Component
demos.description: Provides multiple types of text and a link.
demos.descriptionZh: 内置不同样式的文本以及超链接组件。
demos.code:
import React from 'react';
import { Space, Typography } from 'antd';

const { Text, Link } = Typography;

const App: React.FC = () => (
  <Space vertical>
    <Text>Ant Design (default)</Text>
    <Text type="secondary">Ant Design (secondary)</Text>
    <Text type="success">Ant Design (success)</Text>
    <Text type="warning">Ant Design (warning)</Text>
    <Text type="danger">Ant Design (danger)</Text>
    <Text disabled>Ant Design (disabled)</Text>
    <Text mark>Ant Design (mark)</Text>
    <Text code>Ant Design (code)</Text>
    <Text keyboard>Ant Design (keyboard)</Text>
    <Text underline>Ant Design (underline)</Text>
    <Text delete>Ant Design (delete)</Text>
    <Text strong>Ant Design (strong)</Text>
    <Text italic>Ant Design (italic)</Text>
    <Link href="https://ant.design" target="_blank">
      Ant Design (Link)
    </Link>
  </Space>
);

export default App;

demos.name: title
demos.title: Title Component
demos.description: Display title in different levels.
demos.descriptionZh: 展示不同级别的标题。

components.name: Upload
components.description: Used to select and upload files or drag and drop files.
components.descriptionZh: 文件选择上传和拖拽上传控件。
components.whenToUse:
Uploading is the process of publishing information (web pages, text, pictures, video, etc.) to a remote server via a web page or upload tool.

- When you need to upload one or more files.
- When you need to show the process of uploading.
- When you need to upload files by dragging and dropping.
components.whenToUseZh:
{#when-to-use}

上传是将信息（网页、文字、图片、视频等）通过网页或者上传工具发布到远程服务器上的过程。

- 当需要上传一个或一些文件时。
- 当需要展现上传的进度时。
- 当需要使用拖拽交互时。

props.name: accept
props.description: File types that can be accepted. See [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)
props.descriptionZh: 接受上传的文件类型，详见 [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)

props.name: action
props.description: Uploading URL
props.descriptionZh: 上传的地址

props.name: beforeUpload
props.description: Hook function which will be executed before uploading. Uploading will be stopped with `false` or a rejected Promise returned. When returned value is `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`, the list of files that have been uploaded will ignore it. **Warning：this function is not supported in IE9**
props.descriptionZh: 上传文件之前的钩子，参数为上传的文件，若返回 `false` 则停止上传。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 reject 时则停止上传，resolve 时开始上传（ resolve 传入 `File` 或 `Blob` 对象则上传 resolve 传入对象）；也可以返回 `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`，此时列表中将不展示此文件。 **注意：IE9 不支持该方法**

props.name: customRequest
props.description: Override for the default xhr behavior allowing for additional customization and the ability to implement your own XMLHttpRequest
props.descriptionZh: 通过覆盖默认的上传行为，可以自定义自己的上传实现

props.name: classNames
props.description: Customize class for each semantic structure inside the component. Supports object or function.
props.descriptionZh: 用于自定义组件内部各语义化结构的 class，支持对象或函数

props.name: data
props.description: Uploading extra params or function which can return uploading extra params
props.descriptionZh: 上传所需额外参数或返回上传额外参数的方法

props.name: defaultFileList
props.description: Default list of files that have been uploaded
props.descriptionZh: 默认已经上传的文件列表

props.name: directory
props.description: Support upload whole directory ([caniuse](https://caniuse.com/#feat=input-file-directory))
props.descriptionZh: 支持上传文件夹（[caniuse](https://caniuse.com/#feat=input-file-directory)）

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable upload button
props.since: When customizing Upload children, please pass the disabled attribute to the child node at the same time to ensure the disabled rendering effect is consistent.
props.descriptionZh: 是否禁用

props.name: fileList
props.description: List of files that have been uploaded (controlled). Here is a common issue [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423) when using it
props.descriptionZh: 已经上传的文件列表（受控），使用此参数时，如果遇到 `onChange` 只调用一次的问题，请参考 [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423)

props.name: headers
props.description: Set request headers, valid above IE10
props.descriptionZh: 设置上传的请求头部，IE10 以上有效

props.name: iconRender
props.description: Custom show icon
props.descriptionZh: 自定义显示 icon

props.name: isImageUrl
props.description: Customize if render <img /> in thumbnail
props.descriptionZh: 自定义缩略图是否使用 <img /> 标签进行显示

props.name: itemRender
props.type: (originNode: ReactElement, file: UploadFile, fileList: object\[], actions: { download: function, preview: function, remove: function }) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Custom item of uploadList
props.descriptionZh: 自定义上传列表项

props.name: listType
props.description: Built-in stylesheets, support for four types: `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` or `picture-circle`
props.descriptionZh: 上传列表的内建样式，支持四种基本样式 `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` 和 `picture-circle`

props.description: Limit the number of uploaded files. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is `1`
props.descriptionZh: 限制上传数量。当为 1 时，始终用最新上传的文件代替当前文件

props.name: method
props.description: The http method of upload request
props.descriptionZh: 上传请求的 http method

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether to support selected multiple files. `IE10+` supported. You can select multiple files with CTRL holding down while multiple is set to be true
props.descriptionZh: 是否支持多选文件，`ie10+` 支持。开启后按住 ctrl 可选择多个文件

props.name: name
props.description: The name of uploading file
props.descriptionZh: 发到后台的文件参数名

props.name: openFileDialogOnClick
props.description: Click open file dialog
props.descriptionZh: 点击打开文件对话框

props.name: pastable
props.description: Support paste file
props.descriptionZh: 是否支持粘贴文件

props.name: previewFile
props.description: Customize preview file logic
props.descriptionZh: 自定义文件预览逻辑

props.name: progress
props.description: Custom progress bar
props.descriptionZh: 自定义进度条样式

props.name: showUploadList
props.description: Whether to show default upload list, could be an object to specify `extra`, `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` and `downloadIcon` individually
props.descriptionZh: 是否展示文件列表, 可设为一个对象，用于单独设定 `extra`(5.20.0+), `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` 和 `downloadIcon`

props.name: styles

props.descriptionZh: 上传文件改变时的回调，上传每个阶段都会触发该事件。详见 [onChange](#onchange)

faq.question: How do I implement upload server side?
faq.answer:
- You can consult [jQuery-File-Upload](https://github.com/blueimp/jQuery-File-Upload/wiki#server-side) about how to implement server side upload interface.
- There is a mock example of [express](https://github.com/react-component/upload/blob/211979fdaa2c7896b6496df7061a0cfc0fc5434e/server.js) in rc-upload.

faq.question: I want to display download links.
faq.answer: Please set property `url` of each item in `fileList` to control the content of the link.

faq.question: How to use `customRequest`?
faq.answer: See <https://github.com/react-component/upload#customrequest>.

faq.question: Why will the `fileList` that's in control not trigger `onChange` `status` update when the file is not in the list?
faq.answer: `onChange` will only trigger when the file is in the list, it will ignore any events removed from the list. Please note that there does exist a bug which makes an event still trigger even when the file is not in the list before `4.13.0`.

faq.question: Why does `onChange` sometimes return File object and other times return { originFileObj: File }?
faq.answer: For compatible case, we return File object when `beforeUpload` return `false`. It will merge to `{ originFileObj: File }` in the next major version. Current version is compatible to get origin file by `info.file.originFileObj`. You can change this before a major release.

faq.question: Why sometimes Chrome can not upload?
faq.answer: Chrome update will also break native upload. Please restart Chrome to finish the upload job. Ref: - [#48007](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/48007) - [#32672](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32672) - [#32913](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32913) - [#33988](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/33988)

faq.question: Handle abnormal image watermarks
faq.answer:
When using an image watermark and the image loads abnormally, you can add `content` at the same time to prevent the watermark from becoming invalid (since 5.2.3).

```typescript jsx
<Watermark
  height={30}
  width={130}
  content="Ant Design"
  image="https://mdn.alipayobjects.com/huamei_7uahnr/afts/img/A*lkAoRbywo0oAAAAAAAAAAAAADrJ8AQ/original"
>
  <div style={{ height: 500 }} />
</Watermark>
```

faq.question: Why `overflow: hidden` style is added since version 5.18.0?
faq.answer:
User can hide the watermark by setting the container height to 0 through the developer tool in the previous version. To avoid this situation, we added the `overflow: hidden` style to the container. When the container height changes, the content is also hidden. You can override the style to modify this behavior:

```tsx
<Watermark style={{ overflow: 'visible' }} />
```

changes.description: - 🐞 Fix Button `defaultBg`, `defaultColor`, `defaultHoverColor` and `defaultActiveColor` tokens not taking effect. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
- 🐞 Fix Button default tokens not taking effect. [](https://github.com/unknowntocka)
- 🐞 Fix Button `variant="solid"` borders displaying incorrectly inside Space.Compact. [](https://github.com/Pareder)
🐞 Fix Input.TextArea ref missing `nativeElement` property. [](https://github.com/smith3816)
🐞 Fix Flex default `align` not taking effect when using `orientation`. [](https://github.com/YingtaoMo)
🐞 Fix Typography link selector specificity being too low causing styles to be overridden. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix ColorPicker HEX input allowing invalid characters. [](https://github.com/treephesians)
🐞 Fix Button with href wrapped by Typography showing incorrect color and flickering outline on hover. [](https://github.com/QdabuliuQ)
🐞 Fix component token not taking effect for Button with `type="text"`. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix where components within the Popover were affected by the state association with Form.Item.
🐞 Fix the placeholders displayed incorrectly when selecting multiple items in Select.
💄 Fix misaligned elements in Pagination when the global `fontSize` is increased. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
💄 Fix incorrect Drawer dragger position in RTL mode. [](https://github.com/QdabuliuQ)
🐞 Fix Button child element's `className` be cleared if it contains two Chinese characters. [](https://github.com/QdabuliuQ)
🐞 Fix DatePicker DOM not updated bug after update `suffixIcon` as `null`. [](https://github.com/AlanQtten)
🐞 Fix Table content area border radius when set border radius for container. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
💄 Fix Card unexpected border radius for Body area. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
💄 MISC: Fix unexpected `undefined` and `null` in the injected styles. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
💄 MISC: Improve `background` transition to `background-color` for all components. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🛠 Improve Grid use `genCssVar` method to generate more stable CSS variable names. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🛠 Improve -design/icons usage to avoid depend on full package since externals. [](https://github.com/ShenHongFei)
🛠 Button, Masonry, Mentions, Select, Space, Splitter, Steps and other components batch use `genCssVar` method to generate more stable CSS variable names. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🆕 QRCode adds `marginSize` property for displaying QR code margin area. [](https://github.com/afc163)
🆕 Tour adds `keyboard` property to configure keyboard operations. [-Lu](https://github.com/cactuser-Lu)
- 🆕 Tooltip adds `maxWidth` design token. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
- 🆕 Tooltip/Popover/Popconfirm can be closed with ESC by default. [](https://github.com/aojunhao123)
🛠 Steps remove useless styles. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🆕 Form supports `tel` type validation. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
🐞 Fix Badge `ref` not working when using `text` property. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
🆕 Calendar and DatePicker `locale` configuration now supports partial content filling. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix ConfigProvider `theme.cssVar` configuration not working for icons. [](https://github.com/seanparmelee)
🐞 Fix Collapse `items` semantic properties not working. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
- 🆕 Modal supports `focusable.trap` to configure whether to lock focus within the Modal. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
- 🛠 Remove useless DOM structure from Modal and optimize focus capture to prevent accidental focus escape outside the Modal. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
- 🆕 ConfigProvider supports `pagination` configuration for `totalBoundary` and `showSizeChanger` properties. [](https://github.com/chiaweilee)
- 🆕 ConfigProvider supports configuring Alert global icons. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
- 🆕 Drawer adds `focusable` to configure focus behavior after opening, supporting focus locking within the container and focus returning after closing. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
- 🐞 Fix Drawer `size` definition not supporting string type. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
🐞 Fix Image nested in Modal cannot be closed sequentially with Esc. [](https://github.com/aojunhao123)
🆕 Pagination supports `size` property. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
🆕 Breadcrumb supports `dropdownIcon` customization. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
🆕 Checkbox.Group supports `role` configuration. [](https://github.com/Pareder)
💄 Mentions fix invalid style `padding: undefined` in different sizes. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Fix Select clear button alignment issue when `size="small"`. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix Select with multiple `aria-` attributes in DOM. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
🐞 Fix Table where hidden measure headers could mount interactive filter dropdowns and trigger unexpected close events when `scroll.y` is enabled. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix Drawer.PurePanel failing to respond to mouse interactions. [](https://github.com/wanpan11)
🐞 Fix Select `options` props leaking to DOM elements and causing React unknown-prop warnings. [](https://github.com/afc163)
🐞 Button fix missing wave effect and the issue where the component could not show Dropdown on hover immediately after clicking. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
🐞 Fix Form.List with `useWatch` causing double rendering on item removal, with the first render showing an incorrect intermediate state. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
💄 Breadcrumb fix style issue when using a custom `itemRender`. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
- 💄 Remove Transfer className for the selected state when the component is `disabled`. [](https://github.com/zenggpzqbx)
- 🐞 Transfer prioritize using the `disabled` property of the component. [](https://github.com/zenggpzqbx)
- 🐞 Fix Select missing semantic DOM names. [](https://github.com/seanparmelee)
- 🐞 Fix Select wrong hover cursor style when in search mode. [](https://github.com/fpsqdb)
- 🐞 Fix Select cursor style when disabled with `showSearch` enabled. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
💄 Card fix style issue where an unexpected border radius is displayed when using `Card.Grid` without a header. [](https://github.com/DDDDD12138)
💄 Tag deepen default background to improve borderless contrast. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
⌨ Segmented fix duplicate `role` and unnecessary `aria-` attributes on items. [](https://github.com/aojunhao123)
🐞 Fix DatePicker cannot support webpack 4: Can't resolve '-component/picker/locale/en_US'. [](https://github.com/afc163)
🐞 Fix ColorPicker inconsistent input heights. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
🐞 Fix notification default background color not white when cssVar is disabled. [](https://github.com/wanpan11)
🐞 Fix Input border missing when focused on Space.Compact with `allowClear` prop. [](https://github.com/tuzixiangs)
🐞 Fix vertical Splitter incorrect collapse behavior in RTL mode, RTL flipping is now applied only to horizontal layouts [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 Fix Result not passing through `data-*` and `aria-*` attributes to the root DOM element. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🐞 MISC: `theme.cssVar.prefix` and `theme.cssVar.key` now respect empty string value. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
💄 Lift Breadcrumb link style priority. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
🐞 Fix ConfigProvider `closable.placement` not working. [-student](https://github.com/meet-student)
🐞 Fix Form `onValuesChange` params missing Form.List nested content. [](https://github.com/zombieJ)
🐞 Fix Select `selectorBg` token not working. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
🐞 Fix Upload incorrect progress position style. [](https://github.com/QDyanbing)
🆕 ConfigProvider supports configuring the `trigger` property for Tooltip, Popover, and Popconfirm. [](https://github.com/aojunhao123)
🆕 Alert add semantic close button element. [-ice](https://github.com/coding-ice)
- 🆕 Drawer add semantic close button element. [-ice](https://github.com/coding-ice)
- 🆕 Drawer add boolean type setting for `resizable`. [-Lu](https://github.com/cactuser-Lu)
- 🆕 Select add multi-field search functionality to `optionFilterProp`. [-hero](https://github.com/ug-hero)
- 🐞 Fix Select input cursor displayed in non-search mode. [](https://github.com/afc163)
- 🐞 Fix the「Select」option was not enabled when Select contained interactive content. [](https://github.com/yoyo837)
🐞 Fix Table `cellFontSizeSM` and `cellFontSizeLG` tokens not working. [](https://github.com/guoyunhe)
🐞 Fix Button tokens (primaryColor, dangerColor, defaultHoverBg, defaultActiveBg) not working with specific variants (solid, outlined, dashed). [](https://github.com/tuzixiangs)
💄 Fix Menu item styles not taking effect. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
